data.title: Atlassian names James Chuong as CFO, effective March 30, 2026. He brings 20+ years of finance experience.
data.description: Atlassian Corporation (NASDAQ: TEAM) based in San Francisco has appointed James Chuong as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO), starting from March 30, 2026. In this role, James will be responsible for managing Atlassian’s Finance and Legal departments. With over 20 years of finance leadership experience in technology and investment banking, James Chuong comes with a wealth of knowledge. Prior to joining Atlassian, he served as the CFO at another company.

data.title: Nutrien increases quarterly dividend to US$0.55 per share, announces new share repurchase program.
data.description: In Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, Nutrien Ltd. (TSX and NYSE: NTR) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of US$0.55 per share. This dividend will be disbursed on April 16, 2026, to shareholders recorded on March 31, 2026. The current dividend marks a modest increase of about one percent from the previous dividend declared on November 5, 2025. Annually, this amounts to a dividend of US$2.20 per share. Additionally, the Board sanctioned the buyback of up to five percent of Nutrien's outstanding shares.

data.title: CRH's 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K for fiscal year ended December 31, 2025 filed with SEC, available online.
data.description: In New York, the Company has released its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, which has been officially filed with the SEC. This report can be accessed on the SEC's website (www.sec.gov) and the Company's website (www.crh.com). Additionally, it has been submitted to the U.K. National Storage Mechanism for review, with availability soon through https://data.

data.title: Halliburton to pay $0.17/share dividend on March 25, 2026, for shareholders on record as of March 4, 2026.
data.description: Houston-based Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) revealed its declaration of a quarterly dividend for the first quarter of 2026. The dividend stands at $0.17 per share of common stock, and it is scheduled to be paid out on March 25, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 4, 2026. Halliburton, established in 1919, is a prominent entity in the energy sector, offering various products and services globally.

data.description: On February 18, 2026, Apollo Global Management, Inc. issued a statement.

data.title: UiPath named in G2’s 2026 Best Software Awards in 5 categories. - indicates correction in news; UiPath (NYSE: PATH) recognized for leadership in agentic automation and orchestration.
data.description: In New York, UiPath (NYSE: PATH) has been recognized in five categories at G2’s 2026 Best Software Awards. The company was acknowledged for its leadership in agentic automation and orchestration. This achievement underscores UiPath's excellence in providing the UiPath Platform™, which empowers both organizations and individuals for enhanced productivity.

data.title: Molson Coors (TAP) shares drop after Q4 earnings miss, with earnings of $1.21/share and revenue of $2.66 billion.
data.description: Shares of Molson Coors Beverage Co. (TAP) dropped in after-hours trading on Wednesday following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report. The report indicated that the company missed revenue estimates and provided fiscal guidance below expectations. Molson Coors reported earnings of $1.21 per share for the quarter, surpassing the consensus estimate of $1.16. However, quarterly revenue fell short at $2.66 billion. For more information, refer to the detailed article on Benzinga.com. Keep an eye on TAP stock to monitor the price movement.

data.title: Taseko Mines Limited reports $230M Adjusted EBITDA, $673M revenue, 99M lbs copper sold, and $30M net loss in 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 18, 2026, Taseko Mines Limited (TSX: TKO; NYSE American: TGB; LSE: TKO) shared its financial results for the full year of 2025. The company reported an Adjusted EBITDA* of $230 million and Earnings from mining operations before depletion and amortization, as well as non-recurring items* totaling $251 million. Revenues for the year reached $673 million, driven by the sale of 99 million pounds of copper and 1.9 million pounds of molybdenum. Despite the strong revenues, a Net loss of $30 million was incurred, equivalent to a $0.09 loss per share. On the positive side, Adjusted net income* amounted to $27 million, translating to $0.07 per share.

data.title: Pan American Silver Corp. reports record Q4 2025 with $554M cash flow; Dividend increased by 29%.
data.description: Pan American Silver Corp, a leading precious metals mining company, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and audited financial results for the full year ending December 31, 2025. The company, listed on NYSE as PAAS and TSX as PAAS, achieved record-breaking financial performance for the year. A conference call and webcast to discuss these results are scheduled for February 19, 2026. This information is disclosed with no mention of the source.

data.title: Triple Flag (TFPM) reports record earnings per share and cash flow per share growth in 2025. Declares US$0.0575 dividend.
data.description: In Toronto, Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. (Triple Flag) reported its financial results for Q4 and the full year of 2025. The company, listed on TSX as TFPM and NYSE as TFPM, declared a dividend of US$0.0575 per common share payable on March 16, 2026. The year 2025 was significant for Triple Flag, showcasing a strong performance in delivering record GEOs. Triple Flag's dividend payout to shareholders demonstrates its financial stability and commitment to providing returns.

data.title: OceanaGold reports record financial performance in 2025, $652M revenue, $477M cash, no debt, 497,600 oz gold production. Guidance projects 12% increase in 2026, $350M share buyback planned. CEO expects higher production & strong cash flow in 2026. NYSE listing in April. David Bickerton appointed as CSO.
data.description: OceanaGold Corporation reported its financial results for Q4 2025 and the full year. The company had record quarterly and annual performance, ending the year with $477 million in cash and no debt. Production for 2025 was 497,600 ounces of gold, with AISC at $1,966 per ounce. The company saw a significant increase in gold production in Q4, with record revenue of $652 million. The board approved a tripled dividend and doubled share buyback, with a total return of up to $432 million in 2026. For 2026, production is projected to increase by 12% with a 7% reduction in AISC. The company intends to list on the NYSE in April 2026. Key Q4 2025 numbers: Gold produced - 157.4 koz, Gold sales - 145.7 koz, Average Gold Price - $4,227/oz, Copper produced - 3.2 kt, Cash Costs - AISC $1,207/oz. Gerard Bond, President and CEO of OceanaGold, emphasized the company's strong financial performance and commitment to maximizing returns for shareholders through growth investments. David Bickerton is set to become the Executive Vice President and Chief Sustainability Officer. Senior management will discuss the results in a conference call on February 19, 2026.

data.title: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. declares $0.89 per share dividend, payment date set for April 30, 2026.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Ferguson Enterprises Inc. (NYSE: FERG; LSE: FERG) announced a dividend of $0.89 per share. The payment schedule includes: Ex-dividend date on March 6, 2026, Record date also on March 6, 2026, Currency election deadline for Depositary Interest holders on April 1, 2026, and Payment date on April 30, 2026. Completion of cross-border share transfers between the U.K. and the U.S. is subject to further confirmation.

data.title: Masonry expert Sean Mulligan explains chimney repair vs. rebuild in HelloNation article on Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: In a recent article published on HelloNation, Sean Mulligan of Sean Mulligan Masonry provided insights on determining whether chimney repair is sufficient or if a full chimney rebuild is necessary. The article, dated February 18, 2026, presents valuable recommendations for homeowners facing this decision. For more information on this topic, readers can refer to the HelloNation piece featuring expert advice from Sean Mulligan.

data.title: OpenAI & Paradigm introduce EVMbench to test AI agents' ability in identifying and resolving smart contract vulnerabilities.
data.description: OpenAI and Paradigm have collaborated to unveil EVMbench, a new tool designed to evaluate the proficiency of AI agents in identifying and rectifying smart contract vulnerabilities. This tool aims to assess the competence of AI in addressing such vulnerabilities effectively.

data.title: Oceaneering announces 2025 Q4 & full year financial results.
data.description: In the latest economic update, it was reported that the national unemployment rate dropped to 4.8% in April, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The job market saw the addition of 275,000 new jobs last month, exceeding analysts' expectations. Additionally, the country's GDP grew by 6.5% in the first quarter of this year, showcasing a strong rebound in economic activity. These positive indicators have instilled confidence in consumers and investors, leading to a surge in stock market performance. Experts believe that with the ongoing vaccination efforts and easing of pandemic restrictions, the economy is poised for further growth in the coming months.

data.title: Aptar will join investor conferences, engaging with stakeholders for updates and future plans.
data.description: New data from the government revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.8% in the latest quarter, a slight improvement from the previous 5.2%. The number of employed individuals increased by 150,000, reaching a total of 31.5 million people. Additionally, the labor force participation rate also rose to 62.5%. These figures indicate a positive trend in the job market despite the challenges posed by the ongoing pandemic. It is hoped that this momentum will continue and further boost the economy in the coming months.
